transcript.text:
[They are 19 years old] 10 seconds left!
[New Year Countdown]
Now we can drink!
[Unni will buy]
[Born in the year 2001]
[Our guests for today: Girls that just turned legal to drink]
It's your first time at a bar, right? Yes
Do I drink it all? No no no don't
[Showing them how it's done]
Did we order too much?
[9 Dishes of Food]
You have to always be careful of alcohol
[Tzu-teacher's Alcohol Class]
Congratulations on turning legal
[Drink it all?]
My heart is racing

That's not good
[Out of control]
[Somek master (Soju+Beer)]
[Wow]
[What type of guys do you like?]
[Revealed soon]
[Alcohol Mukbang with the 20-year-olds]
[We got permission from their parents to film]
[Kyungsung Bar located in Jamsil]
Here we have fresh 20-year-olds that were born in the year 2001
Come on out~
[Shy]
Hello
My name is Lee Min Ju from
Bae Se Jin,
Lee Min Eun

All from the same school
We talked for about an hour at the convenience store and got pretty close
It's stuck!
It's not falling off
[Having fun with their ID cards]
[Their very first entrance to the bar]
Can I see your ID's?
Me too? Yes
Congratulations on turning 20
Did you have spiked fruit drinks before?
No I have not
[Innocent]
They're not falling for me
Well, don't people drink a lot before they turn legal?
You did?
Well I drank with my parents before I turned legal

Just mom and dad? What!?
[Tables have turned]
Order everything you want
Everything!?
[Food>Drinks]
Please check the order for me
[Checking the list]
You forgot 1 Small intestine stew
I'm good at memorizing food names
What is that?
[Fan bought plum juice for Tzuyang] I was watching your show and this was in front of my house
[Excited]
[He recommends to order meat pancake here]
Thank you
Excuse me, can we have meat pancake as well?
[Alcohol is here]

Why are you acting like you've never seen it before?
[Fashionista]
That looks good on you
Her boyfriend told her to wear that because she's too pretty
[Food is here]
[Meat Pancake]
[Let's drink now that the food is here]
[Let's focus]
Why do people do that?
I'm not sure Why do people do this?
[Tzuyang is pouring their first shot] Thank you
Thank you
Cheers
Congratulations on turning legal Thank you
Happy new year
[Awkward]

[One-shot]
[Tasting]
It's okay? Yes
I think she's already drunk
Does it taste good?
It's bittersweet
[Future alcoholic]
Sweet..?
She's acting
[She's in a different world]
Was it really sweet? Yes
I had to spit out my first shot because it was so bitter
I want to stay sober]
[Now for the food]
[Spicy Chicken Feet]
[Korean style egg roll]

[Just here for a feast]
[Spam & Eggs]
Where are you guys going for college?
[Silence]
You don't need to say it if you don't want to
I'm going to study abroad
I'm going to Canada for school
I will be majoring in Children's Education
[Drinks on the house by the owner]
Thank you for this
Don't drink too fast
But I think it's time for us to take another 1
I'm a little thirsty
Don't drink too much at events like MT (Membership Training)
It smells a bit..
I'm curious

I don't like the smell
It tastes good
[Dangerous]
[1 glass for Tzuyang]
It's tasty
Really?
[I've been fooled again!]
I can feel my face get red
You're right, it's red
After drinking 1 shot?
Is she popular in school? Oh yes
You seem popular
She's a cool kid She's cute
She looks so cute
She's really cute in person
Are you drunk already?

[We still have a lot of food coming]
[Garlic Chicken]
Chicken leg for you
[Difference between a normal person and a mukbang streamer]
Yummy
[Small Intestine Stew]
It even has udon noodles!
I'll give you some
Let's do Somek this time (Soju+Beer)
It's my first time
Please don't drink too much
[Time to make Somek]
Just a little bit for her
[Gotta open the beer with the spoon]
[Unni Power]
It didn't make a cool sound

She looks so experienced
[Definitely not her first time] Have you done this many times?
I used to be a bartender
Not like an official bartender
Do bartenders make Somek?
Not really..
I'm going to see how you guys will mix it
[Stir Stir Stir]
I feel like they know it but they're acting like they don't know it
People do this the most
[Reaction master]
Cheers
Don't drink too much
This isn't too bad
Do you like it? Yes
What do you want to do when you go to college?

CC (Campus Couple)
24 hours at the PC cafe
[Just the small stuff]
Naver (Korean search engine) adult verification
What are you trying to watch?
Not to watch anything, but just to do it
[Okay, sure]
Any questions for me?
What do you do in your spare time?
Cameraman: Naver adult verification
What did you say!?
I watch anime and stuff Which one?
Oh, nevermind
What what what?
[Seafood Kimchi Pancake]
[Time for some food]

May I use the restroom?
Sorry and thank you
[Now the truth comes out]
That girl right there,
She's not coming Keep going
She's very loud and annoying
We were watching a scary movie and a chair flew out because of her
[She's back!]
[Silent]
Why?
[Something's wrong]
What did you guys do?
Funny story
[Something's up]
What type of guys do you like?
She looks at bodies

[Round 2]
No like, height
For me, someone that can make me laugh
Someone that's very polite
How about looks? Yes, it matters
No, she doesn't care about looks We know
[There's something here]
Are you talking with someone right now?
I know this guy
[That's it]
How about you?
Someone very nice
And someone that doesn't have too many girls around
I really don't like someone that has a lot of girl friends
Of course looks are a plus, but it doesn't matter too much
So someone very nice and ugly?

That's messed up!
Let's drink up
[To the rim]
I'm sorry
[Don't spill anything in front of Tzuyang]
Tilt the glass a little bit
Cheers
Let's play a game (Never have I ever)
Fold if you are not wearing glasses
Focus on her now
Fold if you're wearing glasses
Fold if you're over 21 years old
Fold if you're an AfreecaTV streamer
Fold if you're 24 years old
[Piece of cake]
I almost drank the soju as a chaser

[1 more game!]
[She lost the game so she has to yell "Subscribe to Tzuyang"]
[Tzuyang is embarrassed]
[More food on the house]
[Cheesy Potato Pancake]
[A chance to watch her mukbang in person]
[A fan brought her some chocolate milk]
[He was already here drinking]
[Thank you]
[A sweet ending]
[Present for Tzuyang]
Congratulations on your streamer awards
I'm so touched It's so unexpected
I should've prepared something too
It was an honor
I had so much fun

We got to meet a world-class celebrity
[Compliments on compliments]
It was a time for me to think back to when I was 20 years old
Just being around young vibes and energy
Thank you
[We took them home safely after this video]
